ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Draft round */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in attendance */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game */,
  "game_referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee officiating the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "quarter1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team in the first quarter */,
  "quarter2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team in the second quarter */,
  "quarter3_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team in the third quarter */,
  "quarter4_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team in the fourth quarter */,
  "overtime_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team in overtime */,
  "final_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "home_team_quarter1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team in the first quarter */,
  "home_team_quarter2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team in the second quarter */,
  "home_team_quarter3_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team in the third quarter */,
  "home_team_quarter4_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team in the fourth quarter */,
  "home_team_overtime_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team in overtime */,
  "away_team_quarter1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team in the first quarter */,
  "away_team_quarter2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team in the second quarter */,
  "away_team_quarter3_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team in the third quarter */,
  "away_team_quarter4_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team in the fourth quarter */,
  "away_team_overtime_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team in overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
